latin: Venator peritus per silvam lacertam magnam persequebatur. subitum sonitum post se audivit. lacerta altera eum a tergo spectabat. 'callida puella,' susurravit, antequam bestia impetum fecit.

questions.target: A second lizard was behind him
choices: A second lizard was behind him

questions.prompt: What were the hunter's last words?

translation: An experienced hunter was tracking a large lizard through the forest. He heard a sudden sound behind him. Another lizard was watching him from behind. 'Clever girl,' he whispered, before the beast attacked.
